hero.badge: E sireletsa malapa a Aforika Borwa · Mahala go simolola
hero.headline: Ngwana wa gago o sireletsegile mo inthaneteng. Re netefaditse seo.
hero.subheadline: Sethala se se feletseng sa tshireletso sa dijithale se agetsweng malapa a Aforika Borwa. Se lebela WhatsApp. Se bua Sezulu. Se lokile ka metsotso e 5.
hero.trust: E dumellana le POPIA · Ga go karata ya mokitlane e e tlhokegang · Khansela nako mgwe le mgwe

trust.internetUsers: Batho ba ba dirisang inthanete ba Aforika Borwa

problem.title: Didirisiwa tsotlhe tsa tshireletso tsa lefatshe di agetswe bone. Eseng mo go wena.
problem.p1: Ngwana wa gago o tshela mo WhatsApp. Ga se mo iMessage. Ga se mo Snapchat.
problem.p2: Bark e bitsa R260 ka kgwedi mme ga e lebele WhatsApp. Qustodio ga e bolele Seburu. Google Family Link e ka feta ka metsotswana e 30.
problem.p3: SafeNet SA e agetswe Soweto, Stellenbosch, Polokwane, le lwapa lengwe le lengwe le fa gare.

howItWorks.label: SafeNet SA E Bereka Jang
howItWorks.headline: E bea ka metsotso e 5. Tshireletso e e tswelelang.
howItWorks.step1: Lata mme o tsene ka nomoro ya gago ya SA. Ga go tlhoke phasewete.
howItWorks.step2: Skena khoutu ya QR mo founung ya ngwana wa gago. Metsotswana e 60.
howItWorks.step3: Luna AI e lebela ka yone nako. Ditemoso ka puo ya gago.

features.headline: Sengwe le sengwe se motsadi wa Aforika Borwa a se tlhokang
features.whatsapp: Go lebela WhatsApp. Mo sedirisweng sa ngwana wa gago. Sephiri.
features.whatsappDesc: Sethala se le seng se utlwisisang ditshoso tsa WhatsApp ka Sezulu, Seburu, Sesotho le Sexhosa. Ga se fetisiwe. E sireletsegile mo POPIA.

pricing.headline: Tshireletso ya lwapa lengwe le lengwe

testimonials.headline: E tshepilwe ke malapa a Aforika Borwa

cta.headline: Dimilione tse 3.2 tsa malapa a Aforika Borwa a tlhoka se. Sa gago ke sengwe sa tsone.
cta.sub: Simolola go sireletsa lwapa la gago gompieno. Mahala go leka. E dumellana le POPIA. E lokile ka metsotso e 5.

footer.description: Motheo wa tshireletso wa dijithale wa malapa a Aforika Borwa. E tsholetswe fano. E agilwe fano.

auth.phonePrompt: Tsenya nomoro ya gago ya mohala ya Aforika Borwa go simolola
auth.phoneHint: Re tla go romela khoutu ya netefatso e le nngwe
auth.verifyHint: Tsenya khoutu ya dinomoro tse 6 e rometsweng go +27
auth.consentDesc: Ka fa tlase ga Molao wa Tshireletso ya Kitso ya Botho wa Aforika Borwa, re tlhoka tumello ya gago mo go se latelang:
auth.agreeAll: Ke dumela mo go tsotlhe tse di kwa godimo
auth.start: Simolola go Sireletsa Lwapa la Me

dashboard.needsAttention: Ditemoso di tlhoka tlhokomelo ya gago
